text: Be ware with this store.  My all time favorite cell phone company scammed me. Went  in to buy 2 new iPhones and was told I was getting free phone case with screen protector. Well that was a lie. I was being charge in my monthly statement for them. Not only did I go back to the store they refused to refund me my money Back. The only way I got half of the money back was by calling sprint customers support. Thanks unno- for scamming me. Please beware and check your monthly statement bill it's under accessories.
